description_long: This is a modern, rectangular pumping station building with a flat, pink roof featuring four large wind turbines at each corner and a central skylight. The facade includes a prominent glass entrance with geometric, art-deco inspired paneling and two vertical metallic columns. The sides and rear of the building are clad in black with bold, angular beige patterns, and landscaped green areas with rows of trees and grass are present along the perimeter. The roof also has green patches, likely for environmental or aesthetic purposes, and solar panels are visible at the center. The structure sits on a paved base with a surrounding sidewalk and a striped border, suggesting integration into an urban environment. The overall design emphasizes sustainability and modernity, with renewable energy features and a visually striking exterior.
description: A modern, rectangular pumping station with a flat pink roof, four wind turbines, solar panels, and landscaped green areas, featuring a glass entrance and bold geometric patterns.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main glass entrance, two metallic columns, wind turbines, and geometric facade details.
description_view_1: Side view reveals black cladding, a green roof patch, and a landscaped area with trees along the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a row of trees, a large green lawn, and the angular beige patterns on the black wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays another green roof patch, a window, and the wind turbines, with less landscaping visible.
